remarks: Nestled in a quiet neighborhood this spacious single family home offers flexibility, comfort, and a highly convenient location. Set on a generous lot, the property features a large backyard ideal for outdoor gatherings, complete with ample parking. Inside, the home provides an expansive layout the main floor features five comfortable, carpeted bedrooms, a full bath, a dedicated laundry room, a bright eat-in kitchen, and a welcoming living room with hardwood flooring, perfect for everyday living and entertaining. The lower level adds even more versatility, offering three additional bedrooms with wall-to-wall carpeting, a full bath, and a spacious living area with dining space and a second kitchen setup. Whether used for extended living, guest accommodations, or recreation, this level enhances the home's overall functionality. The home has been thoughtfully updated, updated cabinets and flooring on both the upper and lower levels, and fully renovated bathrooms upstairs and downstairs. Additional improvements include a new fire-rated window in the lower level and brand new carpeting throughout both levels, enhancing comfort and peace of mind. Enjoy easy access to the Merritt Parkway, while also being within walking distance to the train station and the charming town center, known for its quaint shops and local amenities!
